channel.title: Observation on Picnic Spoons
channel.description: Recent content in Observation on Picnic Spoons

item.title: Field Notebooks
item.description: Thoughts on, and examples of, notes from out in the field. Collections of musings, sketches, facts, observations, and impressions.

item.title: Things Worth Noticing
item.description: Things I find worth noticing in my daily life, with notes from the materials I use to deepen my attention and understanding.
